title: Stone Pebbles 32x
description: Makes stone buttons look like detailed little piles of rocks!
body:
**This is the 32x version of Stone Pebbles. The 16x version can be found on my profile or [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stone-pebbles) :)**

<hr>

This texture pack changes the model and texture of the stone button to resemble stone pebbles when placed.

I think this pack allows a bit more detail to be put into environmental builds such as gardens or paths.

<hr>

The pebbles also rotate randomly to add even more variety to your builds!

They are also able to be placed on walls and ceilings to add more detail to caves and cliffs!

<hr>
Versions 1.1 and above do not work below Minecraft versions below 1.21.6

<center>
<hr>
